summary: The diff shows modifications to 33 frontend files (components, pages, App.tsx, etc.) but is missing evidence for several critical requirements. The backend/main.mo is not present in the diff at all, the README.md is absent, and several configuration/project-structure files (dfx.json, package.json, tsconfig.json, frontend/index.html, frontend/src/main.tsx, utility files, hook files, and page files) are not shown. The diff is also noted as truncated with 13 modified files omitted, so some evidence may be hidden, but based on available evidence the analysis proceeds conservatively.
